meta.title: TAPC Scoring Engine
meta.desc: The mathematical backbone of OPTIMUS. TAPC = T×0.4 + A×0.2 + P×0.3 + C×0.1. Every observable gets scored before any hunting logic executes.

sqlite.query: SELECT component, signal, weight, description FROM tapc_config ORDER BY CASE component WHEN 'T' THEN 1 WHEN 'A' THEN 2 WHEN 'P' THEN 3 WHEN 'C' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END, weight DESC

compute.expr: '**' & $string($count(fetched_sources.tapc)) & '** scoring signals configured (including ' & $string($count($filter(fetched_sources.tapc, function($t) { $t.component = 'negative' }))) & ' negative evidence rules)'
